philosophy: Mean-reversion algorithms exploiting structural microstructure inefficiencies across thousands of liquid equity pairs. Assumes long-term fundamentals are irrelevant — if standard deviation boundaries breach, the book is cut mechanically.

institutional_secrets.regime_detection: Hidden Markov Models (HMM) identifying hidden 'Market States' (Growth to Stagflation transitions).
institutional_secrets.data_provenance: 'Mercerized Data' — Bayesian cleaning of 100+ unconventional datasets (satellite, logistics).
institutional_secrets.segmentation: Medallion (Internal, Short-term, High-Cap) vs RIEF (Institutional, Mid-term, Factor-aware).

factor_exposure.volatility: Short-biased (implicitly selling tails to collect stat-arb spread)
factor_exposure.alternative_data_intensity: Extreme — satellite imagery, credit card flows, web scraping

sector_concentration: Near-Zero — machine-selected across 3,000+ liquid equities; max ~2% per name

risk_constraints.primary_trigger: Variance Expansion Breach (High-gamma regime detection overrides price targets).
risk_constraints.forced_liquidation_trigger: VIX > 25 OR intraday VaR breach (agnostic to asset value).

historical_regime_behavior.q4_2018_rate_hike: De-grossed entire book within 48 hours of Fed Chair statement. Created artificial liquidity vacuum in momentum names.
historical_regime_behavior.march_2020_covid: Full halt. Correlation matrix collapsed to 1.0 — convergence trades became divergence. Major drawdown.
historical_regime_behavior.q3_2022_inflation: Rapid deleveraging. Exited equity swaps within 3 trading sessions as implied vol spiked.

macro_reaction_function: Blind to 5-year fundamentals. Treats duration-induced multiples contraction strictly as variance expansion. Mechanically liquidates regardless of underlying asset quality if VaR limits are breached.

fidelity_score.match_breakdown: Deep 'Black Box' penalty. While the Mercerized Data and HMM logic match known Renaissance research papers, their actual real-time execution is invisible. High-frequency turnover means an SEC 13F filing is effectively 'garbage' for tracking a true Quant agent. AI logic matches behavior, but 70% of the signal is non-verifiable by design.

projected_30d_portfolio.logic: Indiscriminate liquidation of momentum longs as VIX cross 25.
Factor-driven hedge against high-beta tech concentration.
Inverse market positioning to capture variance spike.
